method_summary: An automated pipeline using LLMs to generate research papers across different scientific domains, with automated reviewing and iteration.
key_innovation: Fully automated open-ended scientific discovery system that can generate, evaluate, and iterate on research papers without human intervention.
limitations_stated: DeepSeek Coder fails to correctly call Aider tools
Missing sections and results in generated papers
title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
